name: Domino
short_description: Will you be the first to place all your tiles on the table for a win? Enjoy endless fun with this easy-to-play interface.
detailed_description: Will you be the first to place all your tiles on the table for a win? Enjoy endless fun with this easy-to-play interface. Play Domino anytime, anywhere against one or three opponents. Mix your opponents between CPU or friends and family in a pass-and-play mode. Explore several options such as different tiles and tables, sixes or nines pips sets, amazing music and more.
about_the_game: Will you be the first to place all your tiles on the table for a win? Enjoy endless fun with this easy-to-play interface. Play Domino anytime, anywhere against one or three opponents. Mix your opponents between CPU or friends and family in a pass-and-play mode. Explore several options such as different tiles and tables, sixes or nines pips sets, amazing music and more.
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
